headline: Western Digital Stock Is Up 135% This Year – Here’s Why
summary: Shares of Western Digital (NASDAQ:WDC) are trading around $404 Friday afternoon, modestly higher on the session and capping one of the strongest runs in the AI infrastructure complex this year. Impressively, WDC stock is up 134% year to date (YTD). The rally has legs across multiple timeframes. Western Digital shares have gained 9% in the ... summary: Western Digital Corporation (NASDAQ:WDC) is one of the 10 Best Fast Growth Stocks to Invest In Now.
